note: REBUILT 2026-06-09 against the LIVE book (_quarto.yml): 20 chapters, 00-uvod .. 19-reforme, in 5 parts. Earlier versions of this file described an obsolete chapter numbering (00-prije-pocetka .. 16-zakljucak) that no longer exists on disk; that drift is now removed. Bands measured from the live chapters. STRUCTURE SCAN 2026-06-09 (structure_scan.R over chapters/*.qmd): opener present on 19 of 19 non-exempt chapters (only 00-uvod lacks it, correctly, as it is opener-exempt). callout-praksa present in all 19 substantive chapters (06 and 07 have 3, 14 has 2, rest 1). callout-empirija present everywhere EXCEPT 06-kolektivni-izbor and 08-interesne-skupine (both 0) — the two empirija gaps. callout-vjezba present in only 5 chapters: 03, 04, 13, 14, 18 — the largest pedagogical gap. Formal fig- labelled figures only in 01, 05, 12, 14 (1 each); the book has ~110 OJS interactive blocks across 12 chapters (02 has 30, 14 has 36) that are NOT wrapped in #fig- labels and so do not count as Quarto figures or get cross-references. Definitions use #def- divs (01x2, 06x1, 11x2, 14x2, 18x1), NOT the numbered 'Definicija N.N' format, so structure_scan.R reports def 0 for every chapter — a detector/format mismatch to be aware of. Citation integrity: all [@key] citations resolve against references.bib (no fabricated citations). opener_exempt: the intro chapter (00-uvod) skips the Vodič kroz poglavlje opener; the book has no separate conclusion chapter (19-reforme is the last).

structure.note: S7 section-rhythm bands, added 2026-06-11, extended v1.1 same day. Measured from the live book; the essay band is the 19-reforme norm (even sections, no ### nesting). Two chapter templates: essay (default) demands evenness within the chapter; catalogue (declared roster) demands uniformity among the entry sections, bracketed by full-weight frames. Read by skills/book-continuity/scripts/structure_lint.R. word_chapter_max is a soft cap flagging deep-dive chapters (14-porezi) for split-or-exempt review, not a hard limit. v1.1 added: coda rule (last body section >= median weight), evenness_cv_max (coefficient of variation of body section weights, the headline diagnosis), element weighting (callouts/figures/ojs/tables count toward a section's rendered weight via element_words each), scaffold detection (mostly elements, little prose), and paragraph rhythm (reader-checked, not gated).
structure.deep_dive_note: 14-porezi is a sanctioned long-form deep-dive (~9400 w, 4x median). The word-cap and evenness flags on it are expected and not pathologies. Whether to split it into two chapters is a co-author/architecture decision recorded for DIO IV, not an S7 fix. Internal ### nesting in its non-reserved sections (e.g. Vrste poreza) is still cleaned; the AI and EU/Hrvatska sections hold reserved Croatian and co-author content and are left to the co-authors.
